label: Chapel of the Sealed Dawn
description: The Chapel of the Sealed Dawn forms a compact, bunker-like sanctuary set within the Pale Meridian Enclave’s stepped ferrocrete terraces, its thick walls banded with ceramite ribs for blast resistance. A low nave of vault-roofed galleries runs beneath lumen-strips screened for blackout discipline, casting a cold, regulated light across reliefs of the Emperor in martial aspect. The apse is framed by shuttered embrasures and auspex-linked signal lamps, binding the rites of devotion to the enclave’s constant state of readiness. Floor plates bear engraved litanies and tally marks in the manner of siege-cant, worn smooth by generations of ordered procession.
